notes: When I first ran it the screen was peculiar. it was only showing the top left 3/5ths of the screen. After finding the Game.pref (for me at: /home/<username>/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/202710/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/My Games/Gas Powered Games/Demigod) and opening with a text editor. I changed primary_adapter line to primary_adapter = '1920,1080,60' which  is the native resolution for my monitors and everything worked fine after that.
title: Demigod
